overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded Victorian-style park. The atmosphere is dense with fog, limiting visibility as the character walks along paved paths, crosses a bridge, and eventually exits toward a street.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated entrance to Victorian park with iron fencing

events.description: character walks through the ornate iron gates entering Rosewater Park

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the park entrance gates into the foggy interior

entered.detail: black sign with white text mounted on stone pillars at the park entrance
ornate black wrought iron gates with decorative scrollwork
weathered stone gateposts supporting the park sign
small wooden structure with a window near the entrance
classic Victorian black lamppost with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance to Rosewater Park, passing through ornate iron gates beneath a hanging sign. The fog is thick, limiting visibility as the character walks along the paved entrance path lined with hedges and Victorian lampposts.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy park pathway with manicured hedge borders

events.description: companion character in pink jacket appears and walks alongside the main character
companion character exits the frame, leaving the main character alone

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path as a companion briefly joins from the right side

notable_agents.action: walking alongside the main character through the foggy path

entered.detail: green metal public waste bin on the pathway

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the park, a companion in a pink jacket appears and walks alongside the character briefly before disappearing. The path continues through dense fog with Victorian lampposts and trimmed hedges lining the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate wooden bridge crossing over park grounds

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge with ornate railings, proceeding deeper into the fog-shrouded park

entered.detail: weathered wooden footbridge with ornate black metal railings
decorative black metal fencework along the bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an ornate wooden bridge with decorative railings, surrounded by dense fog and trees. The bridge leads to a winding path that curves through the deeper sections of the park.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced garden area with stone staircases and benches

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking along terraced pathways and climbing stone stairs back toward the park entrance

entered.detail: wooden slatted bench with metal armrests along the path
wide stone staircase with balustrades leading upward
stone retaining walls covered in dense green ivy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along elevated terraces with stone walls and benches, then ascends a grand stone staircase. The Rosewater Park sign and entrance gates come back into view at the top of the stairs as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: park exit leading to urban sidewalk and street

events.description: character exits the park through the iron gates onto the urban sidewalk
urban street with utility poles and distant buildings becomes visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: exiting the park through the gates and walking along the sidewalk toward the foggy street

entered.detail: wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
faint silhouettes of houses and structures visible through the fog
taller municipal street light distinct from park lampposts

segments.scene_description: The character exits Rosewater Park through the iron gates, transitioning from the enclosed garden to an urban sidewalk. The environment shifts to reveal utility poles, street lamps, and the faint outlines of buildings through the dense fog as the character approaches the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fog-shrouded Victorian park that eventually opens into a desolate urban street. It begins as the character passes through ornate iron gates and beneath a hanging sign, moving along a paved path lined with hedges and lampposts under a thick blanket of fog. As the character ventures deeper into the park, a companion in a pink jacket briefly appears and vanishes before the camera follows the path across an ornate wooden bridge surrounded by dense trees. The scene then shifts toward elevated stone terraces and a grand staircase, ascending until the entrance gates come back into view from above. Finally, the camera follows the character back through the iron gates, transitioning from the enclosed garden to a sidewalk populated by utility poles and the faint outlines of buildings.
